overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a continuous walk through a dystopian urban environment. The player moves from a covered outdoor market through crowded city streets with security checkpoints, transitions through a narrow graffiti-covered alley, and enters a secure indoor facility with industrial storage areas and red-lit security corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered market walkway with tarps and boxes on either side

entered.detail: concrete overhang providing partial cover over the walkway
market stalls covered with blue and striped tarps
stacked cardboard boxes and crates beside stalls
thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the roof structure
tall palm trees visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered market walkway with concrete pillars and vendor stalls covered in blue tarps. Cardboard boxes are stacked on the right side. Palm trees are visible in the distance through the open sides of the walkway. The area is empty of people, with diffused natural lighting filtering through the roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with parked vehicles and crowd gathering

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street with direct sunlight
lighting shifts from diffused to direct sunlight as camera moves into open area

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk approaching a crowd gathered near a burning barrel

notable_agents.action: silver sedan parked along the curb near the intersection

entered.detail: asphalt street with traffic lights and crosswalk markings
silver four-door sedan parked at the curb
tall traffic light structure with red signal illuminated
metal barrel with open fire burning inside
red neon sign reading ENTRY on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a sunlit urban street. A silver sedan is parked on the left while a burning trash barrel sits on the right sidewalk. A crowd gathers ahead near a building with a red neon ENTRY sign. The lighting shifts dramatically from diffused to direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded sidewalk with security checkpoint and barriers

events.description: crowd density increases as camera moves through gathered pedestrians

agents.ego_description: moving through dense crowd of pedestrians and security personnel near checkpoint barriers

notable_agents.action: security guard in white helmet and black-yellow armor standing watch near barriers
person with red hair wearing American flag as cape standing near concrete barrier

entered.detail: yellow plastic crowd control barriers lining the sidewalk
American flag draped over concrete barrier
tall multi-story apartment building with weathered facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dense crowd gathered on the sidewalk near yellow security barriers. Security guards in distinctive white helmets and black-yellow armor stand watch. An American flag is draped over a barrier on the right. The burning barrel is now on the left as the camera passes it. A tall residential building rises in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with graffiti and industrial fencing

events.description: turns into narrow alleyway passing security personnel and concrete barriers
ambient light decreases significantly as camera moves deeper into the alley

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alleyway toward building entrance, passing dumpsters and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: person leaning against alley wall near green dumpsters

entered.detail: tall concrete walls with graffiti and weathered surfaces
spray-painted graffiti tags on concrete walls
large green industrial dumpsters against the wall
metal wire fencing along the right side of alley

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a narrow alleyway flanked by concrete walls covered in graffiti. Green dumpsters and wire mesh fences line the right side. The lighting becomes noticeably darker and more enclosed. The tall building is now closer on the right, and the red ENTRY sign is visible ahead above a doorway.

events.description: enters building through metal security gate into storage area
switches from natural outdoor light to fluorescent artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through industrial storage room with metal shelves and boxes, then proceeding through corridors

notable_agents.action: person sitting on folding chair in storage room corner

entered.detail: metal barred security gate at building entrance
metal shelving units with boxes and supplies
exposed ventilation pipes and conduits on ceiling
long fluorescent tube lights illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a building through a metal security gate into an industrial storage room with metal shelving units and cardboard boxes. A person sits in a chair to the right. The lighting shifts to artificial fluorescent lights. Exposed pipes run along the ceiling as the camera moves through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with red neon lighting

events.description: enters secure checkpoint area with red neon security lighting
approaches security door with red laser bars and SECURITY signage

agents.ego_description: approaching security checkpoint door with red neon lighting, moving through secure corridors

notable_agents.action: security guard standing near concrete barriers in red-lit area

entered.detail: metal security door with red laser bars and SECURITY text
bright red neon strip lights above security door
heavy concrete barriers blocking off areas
vertical metal bars on windows showing office interior

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a high-security checkpoint area illuminated by red neon lights. A security door with red laser bars and SECURITY signage dominates the end of the corridor. Concrete barriers line the sides, and office areas are visible through barred windows. A security guard stands near the barriers. The atmosphere shifts to a darker, more ominous tone with the red lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, covered market into a high-security industrial facility, transitioning from natural daylight to ominous artificial red lighting. It begins under a covered walkway with concrete pillars and blue tarp stalls, moving past stacked cardboard boxes toward distant palm trees. As the camera exits into the direct sunlight of an urban street, it passes a silver sedan and a burning trash barrel before pushing through a dense crowd guarded by security personnel behind yellow barriers. The scene then shifts into a narrow, graffiti-covered alleyway where the light dims and the space becomes enclosed by concrete walls and wire mesh fences. Finally, the camera passes through a metal security gate into a fluorescent-lit storage room with exposed pipes, eventually entering a dark corridor dominated by red neon lights and laser security bars.
